name: Sneha Iyer
headline: Data Scientist | NLP & Computer Vision | M.Tech AI/ML
about: M.Tech student specializing in AI/ML with research focus on NLP and computer vision. Published in top-tier conferences. Strong theoretical foundation with growing practical experience in LLM applications and agent frameworks.

experience.title: Data Science Intern
experience.description: Worked on Azure OpenAI integrations for enterprise clients. Built a semantic search system using FAISS and Sentence Transformers. Developed evaluation pipelines for LLM outputs.

experience.title: ML Research Intern
experience.description: Contributed to Gemini model evaluation. Researched prompt optimization techniques. Published findings on few-shot learning with LLMs.

education.school: International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad
Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani

projects.name: EnterpriseQA - RAG for Compliance Docs
projects.description: Enterprise-grade RAG system for compliance document Q&A. Uses hybrid retrieval with BM25 + dense embeddings. Deployed on Azure with authentication and audit logging.

projects.name: VisionAssist - Multimodal AI Assistant
projects.description: Multimodal assistant combining vision and language models for accessibility. Published at AAAI 2025 workshop.

projects.name: LLM Evaluation Framework
projects.description: Open-source framework for evaluating LLM responses on factuality, toxicity, and coherence. 200+ GitHub stars.
